description: LinkedIn is a professional networking platform that also offers business products for marketing, learning, sales, talent, compliance, and consumer identity integrations. Its developer platform lets approved apps integrate with LinkedIn data and workflows through product-specific APIs.
summary: LinkedIn exposes a public HTTP API platform documented on Microsoft Learn across Consumer, Compliance, Learning, Marketing, Sales, and Talent solutions; authentication is via LinkedIn-issued OAuth 2.0 app credentials and bearer access tokens.
